name: RPlog_Interesting_Developments
title: A Privateer Proposition at Customs
summary: Stuck in a long customs line at the spaceport, the flamboyant pirate captain Salty Jack and his Mon Calamari first mate Barnacle Bill are recognized by their old acquaintance Senator Del Marx, who arrives with her Senate Guard Ardin and the cheerful Twi'lek marine Wrista. Jack spins a tall tale of losing their ship, the Freedom Fish, to a great space monster, leaving the pair stranded without identification. Amused, Del offers them temporary IDs and floats a proposition: legitimate work as privateers answering to the New Republic government and its Ministry of Defense, complete with a ship, in exchange for giving up the plunder. Jack is intrigued and willing to hear terms while the lecherous Bill earns a pointed sword-nudge from Wrista after putting his arm around her. The encounter ends amicably, with Del promising to pursue the arrangement and the pair to await word, never far from the nearest tavern.
